title: SAP Component Registry Entry
description: Normalized record per SAP component — Section 3 Layer 2 of project spec. Single source of truth populated by MCPs and consumed by the plugin.

componentName.description: Canonical name used in spec hierarchy[].component — e.g. Button, IconTabBar, ShellBar

figmaCommunityId.description: SAP Web UI Kit Figma Community ID — the published library identifier

figmaComponentId.description: Figma component set key from search_design_system or library inspection. Used with importComponentSetByKeyAsync()

figmaLibraryFileId.description: Figma file ID that hosts this component

supportedVariants.description: Variant property names + their allowed values from sap.m.* enums

supportedProperties.description: All settable properties on the Figma instance — names + types

exposedInLibrary.description: True if Figma instance exposes this — false if internal-only

supportedStates.description: Interaction states supported by the component

typographyRules.description: Text element role → SAP typography style binding

role.description: title, subtitle, body, label, caption, link

colorTokenRules.description: Visual role → SAP token name binding. MUST use only tokens from MANDATORY_TOKENS whitelist.

role.description: fill, stroke, text, background, border, icon

state.description: Optional: which state this applies to

token.description: SAP token name — must be in MANDATORY_TOKENS

accessibilityRules.description: Accessibility requirements per §7 of project spec

compatibleComponents.description: Component names this can be nested inside or beside

incompatiblePatterns.description: Patterns or contexts where this component must NOT be used

guidelineUrl.description: Official SAP Fiori design guideline URL

apiUrl.description: Official SAP UI5 API reference URL

libraryVersion.description: SAP Web UI Kit / OpenUI5 version this record was validated against

lastValidated.description: Date last verified against live SAP documentation

pluginNotes.description: Plugin-specific implementation notes — text injection caveats, sizing constraints, etc.

composition.description: SAP Fiori composition rules. Validates parent/child/sibling relationships at spec-emission and build time. See RULE 8 in skill/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md.

validParents.description: Component names that may legally contain this one. Empty array = top-level only (e.g. ShellBar, DynamicPage).

validChildren.description: Component names this one may legally contain. '*' = any registered component.

mustInclude.description: Children required for the composition to be valid. Plugin auto-adds missing ones with defaults.

mustExclude.description: Children that violate SAP guidelines if nested here. Plugin rejects the spec.

commonSiblings.description: Components that naturally co-occur. Used by the AI layer to suggest completions.

topLevelOnly.description: True for components that may only appear at the screen root (ShellBar, NativeSideNav, DynamicPage).
